category_sources: source_facts.description says it configures Jenkins jobs with YAML files stored in Git; official OpenDev README describes making Jenkins jobs from YAML or JSON.
display_name_sources: Official OpenDev repository README title and docs use 'Jenkins Job Builder'.
docs_sources: Official OpenDev repository README lists online documentation at https://jenkins-job-builder.readthedocs.io/en/latest/.
repo_sources: Official OpenDev repository README lists the repository as https://opendev.org/jjb/jenkins-job-builder and clone URL on opendev.org.
tags_sources: source_facts.description supplies Jenkins, YAML, and Git; official OpenDev repository language listing is Python and README describes configuring Jenkins jobs.
